meta.name: Metrics Dashboard Mailer
meta.description: Pull key metrics from a Google Sheet and email a formatted weekly dashboard with trend indicators and target comparisons.

parameters.content:
## 21 — Metrics Dashboard Mailer

**Required:**
- METRICS_SHEET_ID: sheet with columns metric, value, previous, unit, target, category
- NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**Schedule:** Every Monday at 07:30
**Status:** Beta.

parameters.subject: 📊 Weekly Metrics — {{ $json.week }}
parameters.message:
Weekly Metrics Dashboard — {{ $json.week }}

{{ $json.metrics.map(m => `${m.trend === 'up' ? '📈' : m.trend === 'down' ? '📉' : '➡️'} ${m.metric}: ${m.value} ${m.unit || ''} ${m.delta_pct !== null ? '(' + m.delta_pct + '%)' : ''} ${m.vs_target_pct ? '| Target: ' + m.vs_target_pct + '%' : ''}`).join('\n') }}
